lore.sys:
SYSTEM CONFIGURATION [RESTRICTED]

Memory allocation module bypassed.
Next zone requires cyclic repetition.
Be aware of the admin tools access level.
lore.warn:
INCIDENT REPORT #04

The guard algorithm is repeating its patrol loop indefinitely. If you find the override tool, it can break the loop mechanism. Do not share the loop_override.exe payload.
lore.readme:
WELCOME TO THE STAFF PORTAL.

Reminder: Unauthorized execution of the 'loop_override' tool is strictly prohibited. If you are stuck reading this, you are in the wrong place.

room.mysteriousNote:
Where am I? The last thing I remember... the facility AI went rogue and locked the blast doors. It keeps infinitely looping its security protocols.

If you're reading this, we need to bypass the mainframe to get out. Sadly, I don't know the hardware sequence needed to unlock it, but the shift supervisor's log might have it.
room.employeeLog:
SHIFT SUPERVISOR LOG

Daily Reminder: The AI is very particular about the Mainframe array order. Always sequence it as: Central Processing Unit first, then Volatile Memory, then the Graphics Processor, and finally Persistent Storage.
